understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game. In each level, move selectable pieces to occupy all goal tiles marked '+' simultaneously to win the level and progress.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses CLICK on a target [x,y] position, which attempts to move the currently selected piece there if unblocked. Selection likely occurs by clicking a piece. Walls, obstacles block movement, causing no position change. No pushing mechanics observed. Invalid or blocked clicks waste steps without movement. Step budget is finite per level.

history.summary: Level 1 step budget exhausted.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle game. In each level, move selectable pieces to occupy all goal tiles marked '+' simultaneously to win the level and progress.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses CLICK on a target [x,y] position, which attempts to move the currently selected piece there if unblocked. Selection likely occurs by clicking a piece. Walls, obstacles block movement, causing no position change. No pushing mechanics observed. Invalid or blocked clicks waste steps without movement. Step budget is finite per level.
